case_title: DARIN BOYD VS. GREGORY J WIMMER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,700.00 FILED BY BOYD, DARIN AS TO DEFENDANT WIMMER, GREGORY J D.B.A. WIMMER PROPERTIES, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOYD, DARIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WIMMER, GREGORY J D.B.A. WIMMER PROPERTIES, LLC. $157.24 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $247.24, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: 157.24 PLAINTIFF MAY CASH THE PREVIOUSLY TENDERED CHECK OF 230.79. SEE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-09-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WIMMER, GREGORY J D.B.A. WIMMER PROPERTIES, LLC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT WIMMER, GREGORY J D.B.A. WIMMER PROPERTIES, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOYD, DARIN
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOYD, DARIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-07-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOYD, DARIN AS TO DEFENDANT WIMMER, GREGORY J D.B.A. WIMMER PROPERTIES, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF DARIN BOYD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREGORY J. WIMMER DBA WIMMER PROPERTIES, LLC IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
